initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.location
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN income i ON i.link_to_member = b.link_to_event
GROUP BY e.location
HAVING COUNT(i.income_id) > 40;

SELECT e.location
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN income i ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
GROUP BY e.location
HAVING COUNT(i.income_id) > 40;

SELECT e.location, z.city, z.state
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN income i ON b.link_to_event = i.link_to_member
JOIN member m ON i.link_to_member = m.member_id
JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code
GROUP BY e.location
HAVING COUNT(i.income_id) > 40;

SELECT e.location, z.city, z.state
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN income i ON i.link_to_member = m.member_id
JOIN member m ON m.zip = z.zip_code
JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code
GROUP BY e.location
HAVING COUNT(i.income_id) > 40;

SELECT e.location, z.city, z.short_state AS country
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN income i ON i.link_to_member = b.budget_id
JOIN member m ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code
WHERE b.event_status = 'completed'
GROUP BY e.location
HAVING COUNT(i.income_id) > 40;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT e.location, z.city, z.short_state AS country
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN income i ON i.link_to_member = b.budget_id
JOIN member m ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code
WHERE b.event_status = 'completed'
GROUP BY e.location
HAVING COUNT(i.income_id) > 40;
